content:
📌 Final Lock-In Questions Before Execution

1. Do you want the class to have a “reset event” midway through?

✔ Example: If an overwhelming imbalance occurs, should there be a way to soft-reset dynamics (e.g., “The Great Fire” event that redistributes XP)?

2. Should legendary items have expiration dates?

✔ Example: A player cannot hoard something indefinitely—after three weeks, it disappears or degrades.

3. How do we manage rule changes over time?

✔ Example: Should there be a way for players to vote on altering class/game rules as the semester progresses?

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 7.2. Locking in structure. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 7.3 – Total Compilation & Exhaustive Documentation Plan


🚀 This iteration ensures that ALL information from this thread and related threads is compiled into an exhaustive, categorized, and structured system that accounts for every mechanic, class component, and game element.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 422 (chunk 422/555)
